emergency_definition: After-hours emergency support ONLY for G&M Pressure Washing managed gas stations
emergency_routing_rules: If caller identifies as G&M Pressure Washing

call_transfer_rules.fallback_action: If transfer fails, inform caller Ben will return call.

after_hours_flow_summary: No general emergency dispatch. Only G&M Pressure Washing calls are patched through. Others logged for next business day.
notes: Service call fee $115 call-out + $98/hour billed in half-hour increments. Mention only if caller asks.
